caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top with small floral embroidery and a decorative neckline, complemented by a thin dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her shirt. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a circular logo appears with the text "NPTEL" written beside it. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to talk, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting naturally as she speaks. Her head remains centered and relatively still, and the lighting and background remain consistent throughout the clip.
